1回のアップロードで合計500MBまでアップロードできます。HTML/SVGなど: You can upload up to 500 MB total per upload. Some formats, such as HTML/SVG, cannot be uploaded for security reasons.
You can upload up to 500 MB total per upload. Some formats, such as HTML/SVG, are restricted for security reasons.
AES-256による暗号化を採用しています。アップロードされたファイルはサーバー: FS!QR uses AES-256 encryption. Uploaded files are also stored encrypted on the server.
FS!QR Noteは、アカウント登録なしでリアルタイムに複数人が同時編集できる: FS!QR Note is a free online note service where multiple people can edit together in real time without account registration. Create a room and share the share URL, QR code, room ID, and password to get started. Edits are automatically saved in real time, making it useful for meeting minutes, brainstorming, co-writing, and quick collaboration.
FS!QRでファイルをアップロードしてQRコードや共有リンクで簡単共有。アプリ不: FS!QR ile dosya yükleyip QR kod veya paylaşım bağlantısıyla kolayca paylaşın. Uygulama ve kayıt gerektirmeden PC ile telefon arasında fotoğraf, video ve PDFleri güvenle aktaran, otomatik silmeyi destekleyen ücretsiz hizmet.
FS!QR（エフエスQR）は登録不要・無料で使える日本語ファイル共有サービス。Q: FS!QR, kayıt gerektirmeyen ücretsiz bir dosya paylaşım hizmetidir. QR kod, grup dosya paylaşımı ve gerçek zamanlı notlarla PC ve telefon arasında fotoğraf, video ve PDFleri güvenle gönderip yönetin.
Google Drive等はGoogleアカウントが必要になる場合があります。F: Services such as Google Drive may require a Google account. FS!QR Group requires no account, and participants can join with a share URL or room ID and password.
GoogleドキュメントはGoogleアカウントが必要になる場合があり、共有設定: Google Docs may require a Google account and sharing settings can become complicated. FS!QR Note requires no account, and participants can join with a share URL or room ID and password.
PDF・Word・Excel・PowerPoint・画像（JPEG・PNG）・動: Major file formats are supported, including PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, images (JPEG/PNG), video (MP4), ZIP, and text files. Some formats, such as HTML/SVG, cannot be uploaded for security reasons.

USBは紛失・ウイルス感染のリスクがあり、複数人への配布も手間です。FS!QR: USB drives can be lost, infected with malware, and are cumbersome for distributing to multiple people. FS!QR Group works in the browser, and the whole room is automatically deleted after the retention period.
①QRコードを保存せずページを閉じてしまった → 共有用IDとパスワードが分かれ: 1. You closed the page without saving the QR code: if you know the share ID and password, open it from the search page. 2. You forgot the password: passwords cannot be reset, so keep a note when uploading. 3. You tried to download after the retention period: expired files have already been deleted.
①パスワードを忘れた → 再発行機能はないため、作成時に控えてください。②どのル: 1. You forgot the password: passwords cannot be reissued, so keep a note when creating the room. 2. ①パスワードを忘れてルームに入れない → 再発行機能はないため、作成時に控えてく: 1. You forgot the password and cannot enter the room: passwords cannot be reissued, so keep a note when creating the room. 2. Another member accidentally deleted content: history restore is unavailable, so copy important content regularly. 3. Editing on a smartphone feels cramped: rotate to landscape mode for a wider editor.
「グループの作成」を選択し、ルームIDの自動生成または手動入力と保存期間を指定し: Select Create Group, choose automatic or manual room ID entry and a retention period, then create the room. A 6-digit password is generated automatically.
「ルームを作成」を押し、ルームIDの自動生成または手動入力と保存期間を指定すると: Press Create Room, choose automatic or manual room ID entry and a retention period, then create a collaborative editing room.
いいえ。共有リンクまたはQRコードと、発行された6桁のパスワードがあれば受け取れ: No. Recipients only need the share link or QR code and the issued 6-digit password. No account registration is required.
お問い合わせフォームから日本語でご連絡いただけます。返信時期は内容や運用状況によ: You can contact us in Japanese through the contact form. Response timing depends on the content and operating status.

はい、個人利用から企業・チームでの利用まで幅広く対応しています。共有URL・QR: Yes. It supports a wide range of personal, business, and team use. Temporary file sharing is available with a share URL, QR code, room ID, and password.
アカウント不要で複数人とファイルを共有できる無料サービス。グループルームを作成し: A free service for sharing files with multiple people without accounts. Create a group room and join with a share URL, QR code, room ID, and password. The standard limit is 500 MB total and 30 files.
アップロードデータが不正です。ファイルを選び直してください。: Yükleme verisi geçersiz. Lütfen dosyaları tekrar seçin.
アップロード完了時に6桁のパスワードが発行されます。ダウンロード時にパスワードの: A 6-digit password is issued when upload completes. Downloads require that password, so the QR code or URL alone is not enough to retrieve the file. Files are automatically deleted after the retention period ends.
アップロード時に1日・7日・30日から保存期間を選択できます。期間中は何度でもダ: You can choose a retention period of 1, 7, or 30 days when uploading. Downloads are available any number of times during that period. After expiration, files are automatically deleted from the server.
アップロード時に1日・7日・30日から保存期間を選択できます。期間終了後はサーバ: You can choose a retention period of 1, 7, or 30 days when uploading. Files are automatically deleted from the server after that period. Downloads are restricted by the issued password.
アップロード時に1日・7日・30日から保存期間を選択できます。期限を過ぎるとファ: When uploading, you can choose a retention period of 1, 7, or 30 days. Files are automatically deleted after the period ends.
アップロード時に1日・7日・30日から保存期間を選択できます。期限内は何度でもダ: You can choose a retention period of 1, 7, or 30 days when uploading. Downloads are available any number of times during that period.
アップロード時に選択した保存期間（最大30日）が経過すると自動削除されます。: Files are automatically deleted after the retention period selected at upload time (up to 30 days).

共有URLやQRコード、ルームID、パスワードを伝えることで、取引先や外部講師な: By sharing the share URL, QR code, room ID, and password, business partners or guest instructors can join during the retention period. To end sharing, the creator can delete the room.
共有URLやQRコード、ルームID、パスワードを共有すれば、アカウントを持たない: Guests without accounts can join a note if you share the share URL, QR code, room ID, and password. There is no read-only mode.

標準設定では1つのグループルームにつき合計500MBまで、最大30ファイルまで保: With the standard settings, one group room can store up to 500 MB total and 30 files. Uploading is blocked if the new files plus existing files would exceed the limit.
標準設定ではルーム内の合計500MBまで、最大30ファイルまでアップロードできま: With the standard settings, a room can hold up to 500 MB total and 30 files. Uploading is blocked if the new files plus existing files would exceed the limit.
無料のグループファイル共有サービス。ルームを作成して複数人でファイルを共有・管理: A free group file-sharing service. Create a room to share and manage files with multiple people.
現在はテキスト入力に対応しています。URLやメモ、議事録、コードスニペットなどを: Currently, notes support text input. You can share URLs, memos, meeting minutes, and code snippets as plain text. Image insertion and a formatting toolbar are not available.
生成されたIDが重複しています。新しいIDで再試行してください。: Oluşturulan ID çakışıyor. Lütfen yeni bir ID ile tekrar deneyin.
生成されたQRコードや共有リンク、6桁のパスワードをメールやチャットで共有します: Share the generated QR code or share link and the 6-digit password by email or chat. Select the retention period when uploading.
相手はQRコードを読み取るか共有リンクを開き、必要に応じてパスワードを入力して保: The recipient scans the QR code or opens the share link, enters the password if needed, and downloads within the retention period.
編集内容は最新の本文として保存されます。過去の版を確認・復元する履歴機能やPDF: Edits are saved as the latest text. There is no history feature for viewing or restoring past versions and no PDF export. Save important content locally using full-text copy or another method.
自動生成IDの作成に失敗しました。時間をおいて再試行してください。: Otomatik ID oluşturulamadı. Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyin.
複数人で同時にテキストを編集します。必要な内容は全文コピーなどで手元に保存できま: Multiple people can edit text at the same time. Save important content locally using full-text copy or another method.
試行回数が多いため、一時的に制限しています。時間をおいて再度お試しください。: Çok fazla deneme yapıldı. Erişim geçici olarak sınırlandırılmıştır. Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyin.
通信はHTTPSで暗号化され、共有URLまたはルームIDとパスワードでアクセスを: Communication is encrypted with HTTPS, and access is controlled by the share URL or by room ID and password. Group room files are stored unencrypted on the server, so users should decide for themselves whether to share highly confidential files.
